single.title: Bandwidth used
single.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_category" category_name="$category$" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 | eval TotalBytes=MB_in+MB_out | stats sum(TotalBytes) AS TotalMB | eval TotalMB=round(TotalMB,2)|eval TotalMB = tostring(TotalMB,"commas") + "MB"

chart.title: Bandwidth usage over time
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_category" category_name="$category$" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 |timechart sum(MB_in),sum(MB_out)

chart.title: Top 10 child Categories
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_category" category_name="$category$" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 | eval TotalBytes=MB_in+MB_out | stats sum(TotalBytes) by category_child_name | sort - sum(TotalBytes) | head 10

chart.title: Top 10 Destination Hosts
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_category" category_name="$category$" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 | eval TotalBytes=MB_in+MB_out | stats sum(TotalBytes) by dst_host | sort - sum(TotalBytes) | head 10
